default_source.doc_title: CME Group — FX Futures Contract Specifications

contracts.note: Derived from CME's standard rule (LTD = 3rd-Wednesday − 2 BDs against USD-Fedwire ∪ base RTGS; settlement = 3rd-Wednesday mod-following). Verify against the official contract specs page before trading.
